name: multi-window: New Window makes a 2nd window; New Tab does not
comment: Verifies the multi-window model in the real app: ⇧⌘N opens a separate window (tabs stay the default for ⌘N/Open/sidebar). Requires the Debug build; fixtures staged to /tmp by stage-fixtures.sh (sandbox blocks repo-path launchFiles). NOTE(harden): if AutoPilot's `count` assertion on AXWindow is unsupported, drop the two-windows assert and verify the window count via `autopilot dump-axtree | grep -c AXWindow` in manual verification.
